pipeline_order: raw score (ranking) → calibrated score (CRM) → risk tier → business rules → ecosystem fields → optional SHAP narrative overlay

scores.churn_probability: calibrated — CRM thresholds, risk bands, operating policy
scores.churn_probability_raw: base model — ranking, top-k, queue prioritization

explanation_traceability.shap_top_driver: From model SHAP when merge valid
explanation_traceability.final_top_driver: rule_top_driver OR shap overlay (Very High / High only)

cost_tier_definitions.C0: No offer spend (monitoring / health SMS only)
cost_tier_definitions.C1: Low (automated SMS / app push, no agent)
cost_tier_definitions.C4: High (retention desk call + ARPU-capped save offer)

intervention_policy: recommended_action and rule_id are always rule-driven. SHAP enriches narrative for high tiers only.

shap_merge_validation.shap_overlay_policy: SHAP may replace final_top_driver narrative for Very High / High only; rule_id and recommended_action remain rule-driven.

production_cautions: Re-tune thresholds when calibration or prevalence drifts.
Ecosystem metrics are associative — not causal product effects.
Monitor R99 fallback_share; should stay minority of book.

ecosystem_analytics.disclaimer: Metrics describe observed associations in this snapshot. They do not establish causal effects of ecosystem products on churn.

rubika_usage.label: Rubika
rubika_usage.observed_association: Rubika active subscribers show mean calibrated risk 0.301 vs inactive capable 0.343 (associative; not causal).

ewano_usage.label: EWANO
ewano_usage.observed_association: EWANO active subscribers show mean calibrated risk 0.298 vs inactive capable 0.346 (associative; not causal).

hamrahman_usage.label: Hamrah Man
hamrahman_usage.observed_association: Hamrah Man active subscribers show mean calibrated risk 0.330 vs inactive capable 0.246 (associative; not causal).

volte_usage.label: VoLTE
volte_usage.observed_association: VoLTE active subscribers show mean calibrated risk 0.172 vs inactive capable 0.411 (associative; not causal).

narrative_bullets: Subscribers embedded across multiple operator ecosystem products show lower mean calibrated risk (0.191) than non-ecosystem prepaid (0.414) in this snapshot (associated, not causal).
EWANO adoption is associated with mean calibrated risk 0.298 vs 0.346 among capable non-adopters (observed relationship).
Rubika participation is associated with mean calibrated risk 0.301 vs 0.343 for capable non-users (correlated with engagement; not causal).
Power users of Rubika, EWANO, Hamrah Man, and VoLTE represent a high-value retention cohort — prioritize loyalty preservation over acquisition-style offers.

business_rules.business_rationale: Infant prepaid accounts show the highest observed churn; early recharge and onboarding friction drive exit before habit formation.
business_rules.recommended_action: Prepaid Welcome Save: 30-day onboarding SMS journey + 20% bonus credit on the next two recharges completed within 45 days (auto-applied on recharge).
business_rules.expected_impact: Reduce first-90-day prepaid churn; target +15–25% recharge retention in cohort.

business_rules.business_rationale: Prepaid 5G subscribers combine high-speed product expectations with prepaid volatility; model and EDA both flag this segment as elevated risk.
business_rules.recommended_action: 5G Retention Pack: 3-month discounted 5G night-unlimited add-on + outbound migration assessment for postpaid plan with waived SIM swap fee.
business_rules.expected_impact: Stabilize prepaid 5G base; improve stickiness via bundled data and postpaid path.

business_rules.business_rationale: Multi-product ecosystem users often show lower churn; preserve with loyalty programs rather than acquisition-style discounting.
business_rules.recommended_action: VIP Loyalty Preservation: premium bundle retention, priority support queue, cross-product rewards (Rubika + EWANO + Hamrah Man), no aggressive discounting.
business_rules.expected_impact: Preserve high-value ecosystem customers; prevent premium erosion.

business_rules.top_driver: High monthly spend or bill spike vs history
business_rules.business_rationale: Elevated monthly spend or spend spike vs lifetime average suggests bill shock or plan mismatch—associated with higher churn in the model.
business_rules.recommended_action: Bill Shock Prevention: proactive SMS with itemized spend + optional plan downgrade or 15% discount on next monthly invoice for 6-month stay commitment (digital accept).
business_rules.expected_impact: Lower involuntary churn from bill disputes; protect ARPU on high-value lines.

business_rules.trigger_condition: rubika_user_flag=0 AND is_data_capable=1 AND medium+ risk
business_rules.business_rationale: Lack of Rubika engagement may indicate weak platform stickiness and low embeddedness in the operator social ecosystem.
business_rules.recommended_action: Rubika Onboarding: discounted in-app traffic, exclusive content bundle, social engagement incentives via app push + SMS deep link.
business_rules.expected_impact: Improve ecosystem attachment and digital engagement; reduce switching likelihood.

business_rules.trigger_condition: ewano_user_flag=0 AND (prepaid OR early tenure) AND data capable
business_rules.business_rationale: Financial ecosystem participation is associated with recharge retention through payment habit formation and wallet dependency.
business_rules.recommended_action: EWANO Activation: cashback on first bill payment, recharge bonus via EWANO wallet, targeted app journey for prepaid and early-tenure segments.
business_rules.expected_impact: Increase wallet adoption and ecosystem switching costs.

business_rules.top_driver: Low Hamrah Man / digital ecosystem engagement
business_rules.business_rationale: Low self-service and app adoption often correlates with weaker engagement and higher friction in digital servicing.
business_rules.recommended_action: Hamrah Man Onboarding: app-only retention offers, usage rewards, guided self-service setup journey (SMS + app push).
business_rules.expected_impact: Increase app engagement and digital servicing stickiness.

business_rules.business_rationale: Non-adoption of VoLTE among data-capable users correlates with higher churn; often indicates handset/settings friction or under-provisioned experience.
business_rules.recommended_action: VoLTE Activation Push: one-tap provisioning SMS + 5GB bonus data after first successful VoLTE call within 14 days (tracked via network provisioning).
business_rules.expected_impact: Increase VoLTE attach rate; expected churn reduction among capable non-adopters.

business_rules.business_rationale: Zero VAS among data-capable customers signals low product embedding; EDA shows steep churn gradient as VAS count increases.
business_rules.recommended_action: VAS Starter Bundle: 60-day trial of operator cloud (5GB) + night internet at 50% off; single opt-in via USSD *code* or app banner.
business_rules.expected_impact: Lift VAS adoption and switching costs; improve 90-day retention in zero-VAS cohort.

business_rules.business_rationale: Partial VAS adoption leaves uplift room; expanding to 3+ VAS products is associated with materially lower churn in EDA.
business_rules.recommended_action: Stickiness Cross-sell: 7-day international roaming pass + super-app financial wallet activation with 50,000 Toman cashback on first bill payment via wallet.
business_rules.expected_impact: Increase multi-product attach; move customers up VAS adoption ladder.

business_rules.business_rationale: Postpaid early lifecycle still shows elevated churn risk vs tenured base; loyalty lock before month-12 decision window.
business_rules.recommended_action: Postpaid Loyalty Lock: 10% loyalty discount on months 7–12 when customer accepts e-bill + auto-pay setup within 14 days (contract amendment digital).
business_rules.expected_impact: Extend postpaid tenure through first contract year; reduce early postpaid churn.

business_rules.business_rationale: 2G subscribers lack data service context; upsell path is migration to 3G/4G rather than data VAS campaigns.
business_rules.recommended_action: Legacy Migration Offer: free SIM swap + 3-month introductory 4G data pack (5GB/month) at 40% discount when upgrading network generation in-store or app.
business_rules.expected_impact: Migrate voice-only users to data-capable plans; reduce segment churn via modern plan fit.

business_rules.business_rationale: Safety-net only: fires when calibrated risk >= High tier and no product rule matched. Not a preferred campaign—use sparingly vs targeted plays.
business_rules.recommended_action: Retention Desk Save Call: specialist callback within 48h with personalized offer (credit up to 1× monthly ARPU cap or equivalent free data for 30 days).
business_rules.expected_impact: Catch-all for high-risk saves; prevent unactioned high-score customers.

sample_subscribers.resolution_note: Ecosystem rule for capable Rubika non-adopters at medium+ risk.
sample_subscribers.recommended_action: Rubika Onboarding: discounted in-app traffic, exclusive content bundle, social engagement incentives via app push + SMS deep link.

sample_subscribers.resolution_note: Multi-product ecosystem user — loyalty preservation not acquisition discount.
sample_subscribers.recommended_action: VIP Loyalty Preservation: premium bundle retention, priority support queue, cross-product rewards (Rubika + EWANO + Hamrah Man), no aggressive discounting.
